title: Oil gains as Iran launches attack on Israel
section_path: Oil gains as Iran launches attack on Israel
section_path_text: Oil gains as Iran launches attack on Israel
summary:
Main
Rising geopolitical tensions pushed energy markets higher. Metals also gained amid renew optimism over demand in China. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-10-02 095022.png | assets/2024-10-02_oil-gains-as-iran-launches-attack-on-israel_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ea8d1c2875d9.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices surged higher after Iran launched a missile attack on Israel.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Rising geopolitical tensions pushed energy markets higher. Metals also gained amid renew optimism over demand in China.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices surged higher after Iran launched a missile attack on Israel. More than 100 ballistic missiles were launched, although most of them were intercepted, according to Israel's military.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
Iran's oil output has been rising steadily over the past few years in spite US sanctions on the industry. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-10-02 095038.png | assets/2024-10-02_oil-gains-as-iran-launches-attack-on-israel_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_f31f643cfbb9.png
